name: Maya Hart
bio: We met during our second year architecture studio and still swap trip ideas whenever one of us spots a cheap flight.

name: Nina Patel
bio: Nina coached me through my first product internship and now we try to keep our monthly coffee catch-up alive.

name: Omar Farouk
bio: Our friendship started with late-night rooftop football debates and turned into a standing Friday tea ritual.

name: Zoe Chen
bio: Zoe and I co-led a campus magazine team, and she is still the first person I text when I need honest feedback.

name: Alex Rivera
bio: We met at a founder meetup, bonded over morning workouts, and now trade check-ins on both business and life.

name: Liam Carter
bio: Liam has been around since school bus days, and our friendship somehow survived every console generation and every move.

name: Sofia Khan
bio: Sofia runs the most dependable book club I know, and our long post-meeting walks are usually the best part of the month.

name: Noah Bennett
bio: Noah is the friend who always has a camera in his bag and a plan for the next sunrise drive outside the city.
